title: RaveDAO (RAVE) Drops 15.58% Despite Holding Strong #34 Market Position
excerpt: RaveDAO faces significant selling pressure with a 15.58% decline in the past 24 hours, bringing its price to $11.98. Despite the recent downturn, RAVE maintains its impressive #34 ranking by market capitalization, highlighting the token's resilient position in the competitive DeFi landscape.
